inputs.prompt: Aesthetic: a painterly concept-art forge — cool electric-blue and violet gloom, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze; visible brushwork, nothing slick. Use the reference images as INGREDIENTS for the world, character, and the look of each beat — do NOT reproduce them as static panels or a grid. [Image1] is the wide forge hall with ranks of gold automata receding and the smith at his station. [Image2] is a medium of the bearded blond smith working a gold automaton at the line. [Image3] is a close-up of a gold automaton's serene face, its eyes faintly waking. [Image4] is an over-the-shoulder down the receding ranks of identical automata. [Image5] is the smith alone before the silent ranks as a shadow gathers. ONE continuous cinematic shot: open wide on the forge hall and the receding gold ranks; a slow patient dolly-in along the line arrives on the smith at work; push to the automaton's face as its eyes faintly wake; then ease back and around to reveal the vast ranks of identical others and the small lone smith before them. Warm, then quietly uneasy. Low forge hum, the hiss of a welder, the tick of cooling metal.
